General.Name: Takkt AG
General.Description: TAKKT AG operates as a B2B direct marketing company for business equipment in Europe and North America. It operates in three divisions: Industrial & Packaging, Office Furniture & Displays, and FoodService. The company offers pallet-lifting trucks, universal cabinets and swivel chairs, as well as special-purpose products, such as environmental cabinets and containers for hazardous materials; business equipment and office furniture, including desks, chairs, cabinets, and workbenches under the BiGDUG and OfficeFurnitureOnline brands to small and medium-sized companies; and collapsible boxes, package padding, shipping pallets, and stretch film under the ratioform and Davpack brands. It also provides office furniture products comprising office chairs and desks, conference tables, and furniture for reception areas under the National Business Furniture and OfficeFurniture.com brands to companies and service providers, such as lawyers and architects, as well as public institutions like government agencies and schools; and advertising banners, digital display stands, mobile trade booths, and fixtures under the Displays2go brand. In addition, the company offers buffet equipment, such as serving platters and food baskets to operators of large cafeterias, food service businesses and food retailers; pots and pans; and large appliances, including refrigerators and freezers to hotels, restaurants, cafeterias, and catering companies under the Hubert and XXLhoreca brands. It sells its products through webshop and print marketing, as well as outreach by key account managers and telesales. TAKKT AG was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Stuttgart, Germany.
